subcodes.first_line: I am Thy handmaiden, O my God, and the daughter of Thy handmaiden; I bear witness unto Thy majesty, Thy sovereignty, Thy might
subcodes.first_line_orig: قولی الهی الهی انا امتک و ابنه امتک و اشهد بعظمتک و سلطانک و بعزک و قدرتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
